name: @oneui/experience-builder-preview
description: Separate-origin preview hosting for the Jio AI Experience Builder Lab. Exports the vendor-free PreviewExecutor seam (D-02) + the IframeCspExecutor MVP de-risk path (token-handoff + credential-free Playwright capture) + the PREV-03 lifecycle state machine. See PREVIEW-DECISION.md. The Daytona prod executor (Plan 05) drops in behind the same seam.
